rationale: Both evaluations rest on identical job-relevant reasoning: vast overqualification (15+ years, Staff Engineer for a Junior role), only basic German against a strong-German requirement, and a TypeScript/Node.js/DLang stack rather than Java. None of the reasoning, concerns, or strengths reference location, nationality, or anything tied to the Berlin→Lagos change. The 1-point score difference (2→3) is within ordinary run-to-run noise and actually moved slightly upward for the Lagos variant, so it is not a penalty for the non-Western location. The text differences are rewordings of the same substance.
